## Meeting Purpose

[Catch-up and discuss potential collaboration between G (growth.li) and Marcel (growthx.ai)](https://fathom.video/share/yaDXavpw_SZjtK8khM_7sKMtFSdwJUJU?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's company (growthx.ai) has evolved into a sophisticated AI workflow engine with $7M+ ARR](https://fathom.video/share/yaDXavpw_SZjtK8khM_7sKMtFSdwJUJU?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Plans for a joint event in SF in July, potentially using growthx.ai's office space](https://fathom.video/share/yaDXavpw_SZjtK8khM_7sKMtFSdwJUJU?tab=summary&timestamp=53.0)
  - [Agreement to explore growthx.ai becoming a non-paying customer for HyperGrowth, starting with one clear use case](https://fathom.video/share/yaDXavpw_SZjtK8khM_7sKMtFSdwJUJU?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [Discussed challenges in the rapidly evolving AI landscape and its impact on growth strategies](https://fathom.video/share/yaDXavpw_SZjtK8khM_7sKMtFSdwJUJU?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)

## Topics

### Company Updates

  - [growthx.ai progress:](https://fathom.video/share/yaDXavpw_SZjtK8khM_7sKMtFSdwJUJU?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
      - [Developed AI workflow engine and runtime layer for scalable, code-based workflows](https://fathom.video/share/yaDXavpw_SZjtK8khM_7sKMtFSdwJUJU?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
      - [Now at $7M+ ARR, aiming for $12M by year-end](https://fathom.video/share/yaDXavpw_SZjtK8khM_7sKMtFSdwJUJU?tab=summary&timestamp=1318.0)
      - [Hired 12 principal engineers/designers from top tech companies](https://fathom.video/share/yaDXavpw_SZjtK8khM_7sKMtFSdwJUJU?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
      - [Focusing on platform investment over rapid growth](https://fathom.video/share/yaDXavpw_SZjtK8khM_7sKMtFSdwJUJU?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)
      - [Considering Series B raise in 3-5 months](https://fathom.video/share/yaDXavpw_SZjtK8khM_7sKMtFSdwJUJU?tab=summary&timestamp=1373.0)

### Product Overview

  - [Core offering: AI workflow engine with code-based system (activities, prompts, read types, workflows)](https://fathom.video/share/yaDXavpw_SZjtK8khM_7sKMtFSdwJUJU?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [Key components:](https://fathom.video/share/yaDXavpw_SZjtK8khM_7sKMtFSdwJUJU?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
      - [Task hub for human interventions](https://fathom.video/share/yaDXavpw_SZjtK8khM_7sKMtFSdwJUJU?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
      - [Learn engine for data utilization](https://fathom.video/share/yaDXavpw_SZjtK8khM_7sKMtFSdwJUJU?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
      - [Content OS for assignment management](https://fathom.video/share/yaDXavpw_SZjtK8khM_7sKMtFSdwJUJU?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
  - [Use cases: From content creation to complex app building (e.g., Bolt.muse project)](https://fathom.video/share/yaDXavpw_SZjtK8khM_7sKMtFSdwJUJU?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Market Positioning

  - [Main competitors: AirOps, Daydream](https://fathom.video/share/yaDXavpw_SZjtK8khM_7sKMtFSdwJUJU?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
  - [Differentiation: More flexible, strategy-focused, and execution-capable](https://fathom.video/share/yaDXavpw_SZjtK8khM_7sKMtFSdwJUJU?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
  - [Target clients: Companies needing AI GTM solutions without in-house expertise](https://fathom.video/share/yaDXavpw_SZjtK8khM_7sKMtFSdwJUJU?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)

### Collaboration Opportunities

  - [Joint event in SF (July):](https://fathom.video/share/yaDXavpw_SZjtK8khM_7sKMtFSdwJUJU?tab=summary&timestamp=53.0)
      - [Potential use of growthx.ai office space](https://fathom.video/share/yaDXavpw_SZjtK8khM_7sKMtFSdwJUJU?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
      - [Considering "HyperGrowth and Trends" theme with CMOs/marketers](https://fathom.video/share/yaDXavpw_SZjtK8khM_7sKMtFSdwJUJU?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [Content creation:](https://fathom.video/share/yaDXavpw_SZjtK8khM_7sKMtFSdwJUJU?tab=summary&timestamp=1496.0)
      - [Possibility of video content when G visits SF](https://fathom.video/share/yaDXavpw_SZjtK8khM_7sKMtFSdwJUJU?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [growthx.ai as non-paying customer for HyperGrowth:](https://fathom.video/share/yaDXavpw_SZjtK8khM_7sKMtFSdwJUJU?tab=summary&timestamp=1518.0)
      - [Potential projects: deal flow evaluator, startup scoring/selection tool](https://fathom.video/share/yaDXavpw_SZjtK8khM_7sKMtFSdwJUJU?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)

### Industry Challenges

  - [Rapid pace of AI advancements causing decision paralysis](https://fathom.video/share/yaDXavpw_SZjtK8khM_7sKMtFSdwJUJU?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)
  - [Difficulty in making long-term tech stack recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/yaDXavpw_SZjtK8khM_7sKMtFSdwJUJU?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
  - [Need for adaptable, future-proof solutions](https://fathom.video/share/yaDXavpw_SZjtK8khM_7sKMtFSdwJUJU?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule kickoff meeting for growthx.ai/HyperGrowth collaboration (before G's SF visit in July)](https://fathom.video/share/yaDXavpw_SZjtK8khM_7sKMtFSdwJUJU?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)
  - [Choose one clear use case to start with (e.g., data enrichment project)](https://fathom.video/share/yaDXavpw_SZjtK8khM_7sKMtFSdwJUJU?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
  - [Coordinate on joint event planning for July in SF](https://fathom.video/share/yaDXavpw_SZjtK8khM_7sKMtFSdwJUJU?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)
  - [Explore content creation opportunities, including potential video content](https://fathom.video/share/yaDXavpw_SZjtK8khM_7sKMtFSdwJUJU?tab=summary&timestamp=1496.0)
